untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Computing shadow ratio relative to median in a lookup table—no indicator exists for this statistical comparison; (2) Specific exit targets (113, 115.34, 107.69) derived from price-dependent formulas not expressible as simple indicator conditions; (3) Author-silent parameters (success rates, average move percentages) cannot be operationalized without explicit thresholds.
translation_notes: Translated upper_wick (upper shadow) as proxy for shadow height; used hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility ratio) as proxy for above/below-average volume comparison. The core logic—tall shadows with directional volume—is partially captured, but the median-based shadow classification and formula-driven exit targets require backtester support for table lookups and price-relative calculations.
